negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_776523e2-a81f-47fe-98a6-8c908b90e472
prompt: The video captures a man engaged in woodworking, set in a workshop environment. The camera moves randomly, providing a full shot from a high-angle perspective, focusing on the man standing and facing left from the viewer's viewpoint. He has short black hair with some graying strands, and is dressed in a dark brown drawstring jumpsuit over a dark blue t-shirt, complemented by a brown wristwatch on his left hand, black-framed glasses, and white shoes. A rectangular white object is tucked between his jumpsuit and t-shirt, and small gray, black, and blue items protrude from his jumpsuit's chest pocket.  Initially, the man holds a large knife in both hands, positioned horizontally in front of his chest. His left hand grips the silver blade, while his right hand holds the brown handle. In front of him lies light brown wood arranged in square sections, with the outer edges circular in shape. He begins cutting the end of a piece of wood by moving both hands to the right and left. As he continues, his left hand releases the blade, allowing him to cut with his right hand alone. A small piece of wood falls to the ground in front of him. Subsequently, the section of wood he was cutting separates from the main piece and falls to the ground. He then grabs the cut wood with his left hand while his right hand slightly lifts the knife.  In the background, a gray floor is scattered with light brown wood chips and red cables. Two individuals are present behind the man: one wears a light blue t-shirt with a black design, dark blue shorts, black shoes with white soles, and gray socks, while the other wears a white shirt tucked into brown pants with a black belt. A gray table filled with cables and yellow and green objects is situated behind the man in the jumpsuit, with two white cups, bottles in green, red, and gray, and white paper on a light brown object beside the gray table. The lighting is bright, reflecting off the knife's surface.
